subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again! I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Next week works well — please share a few time slots that suit you and we'll find something that fits.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share personal contact information for individuals directly. If a senior-level technical conversation makes sense as things progress, we can facilitate the right introductions through proper channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
